creator: seanwbruno@gmail.com
text:
I can't seem to get gnats to accept a jpg attachment or a base64 encoded
attachment. 

Here are links to the panic and the backtrace photos:

http://people.freebsd.org/~sbruno/nvidia_panic_string.jpg
http://people.freebsd.org/~sbruno/nvidia_backtrace.jpg

It doesn't look like the failures are in the driver.

Sean
